summary: Iteration 135: Renumber Invoice and Create Nota Credito Endpoints - ALL 19 TESTS PASS after 2 bug fixes. PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/renumber works on all statuses (bozza, emessa, inviata_sdi, pagata). POST /api/invoices/{id}/create-nota-credito creates NC with document_type='NC', status='bozza', copies lines, references original invoice, and fails for non-FT documents.

renumber_invoice.bozza_status: PASS - Renumber works on bozza invoice
renumber_invoice.emessa_status: PASS - Renumber works on emessa invoice (not restricted)
renumber_invoice.inviata_sdi_status: PASS - Renumber works on inviata_sdi invoice
renumber_invoice.pagata_status: PASS - Renumber works on pagata invoice
renumber_invoice.returns_updated_invoice: PASS - Returns full updated invoice object

create_nota_credito.create_from_ft: PASS - Creates NC from FT invoice successfully
create_nota_credito.references_original: PASS - NC has related_invoice_id and related_invoice_number
create_nota_credito.copies_lines: PASS - NC copies lines from original with new line_id
create_nota_credito.storno_note: PASS - NC has storno note referencing original invoice

bugs_fixed.issue: renumber_invoice returned InvoiceResponse(**updated) causing Pydantic validation errors for invoices missing optional fields
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to return raw dict instead of InvoiceResponse

bugs_fixed.issue: create_nota_credito called get_next_number() without required 'year' argument
bugs_fixed.fix: Added year=datetime.now().year argument to get_next_number() call

critical_code_review_comments: Both bugs were coding errors: missing argument and wrong return type
Renumber endpoint now correctly allows changes on any status (for SDI error correction)
Create NC endpoint correctly validates source document type (only FT/NC allowed)
test_credentials: Test user/session/client/invoices created via mongosh setup fixture
seed_data_creation: 6 test invoices with various statuses (bozza, emessa, inviata_sdi, pagata) plus PRV and DDT for failure testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Renumber and Create Nota Credito endpoints verified working after bug fixes. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration135_renumber_nota_credito.py covers all specified requirements. Frontend testing skipped per instruction (Google OAuth required).
